title: verbascum × godronii
intro: Verbascum × godronii, also known as Giant Mullein or Mullein, is a biennial plant of the Scrophulariaceae family, characterized by its large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Mullein has various health benefits, including soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × godronii include infused oil, salve, and tea, which can be used topically for skin conditions and internally for respiratory and digestive issues.
